description.ko: 질서 속의 혼돈을 표현하며, 정교한 디지털 데이터 파편의 폭풍으로 부서지는 모노리스를 보여줍니다.
description.en: A representation of chaos within order, showcasing a monolith fracturing into a storm of precise digital data shards.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian monolith by KURO-X undergoing recursive geometric deconstruction. Sharp, fractured #808080 and #C0C0C0 polygonal shards are suspended in mid-air against a stark #FFFFFF digital vacuum. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, scanlines, and intense chromatic aberration cut through the composition. High-contrast cinematic lighting with razor-sharp raytraced reflections on fragmented glass-like surfaces. 8k resolution, Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, precise mathematical chaos.
